name: resume-intelligence
description: Build evidence-backed resumes, career coaching artifacts, interview prep, polished DOCX templates, visual HTML/PDF/Figma/Canva-ready resumes, ATS/recruiter scorecards, job match reports, cover letters, LinkedIn recommendations, and redaction reviews from approved career sources.

interface.shortDescription: Create resumes, visual templates, and interview prep from verified evidence.
interface.longDescription: Resume Intelligence guides Codex through approved LinkedIn, local document, Confluence, Jira, public GitHub, and GitHub Enterprise sources to produce recursive source inventories, tool usage logs, evidence-backed resume drafts, detailed interview resumes with full timelines and metrics, career master runs, missing-information loops, career positioning coach outputs, ATS/recruiter scorecards, professional resumes, polished ATS-safe and designed DOCX resume templates, high-fidelity HTML/PDF visual resumes, visual template selectors, Figma and Canva handoff artifacts with optional profile-picture support, job-specific resumes, cover letters, job match scoring reports, project interview briefs, technical-stack interview guides, interview prep packs, interview readiness scorecards, disclosure approval queues, final redaction reviews, and LinkedIn profile recommendations with explicit provenance and confidentiality handling.
defaultPrompt: Use Resume Intelligence to build my detailed interview resume, professional resume, visual template, career coach output, job match report, and interview prep from approved career evidence.
